name: dotnet-style
description: Default stack and workflow opinions for modern .NET (C# 12+, dotnet 8+): preferred libraries (NUnit 4, CommunityToolkit.Mvvm, Serilog two-stage bootstrap), code conventions (sealed records with required init, Nullable + ImplicitUsings), the deterministic ReSharper -> dotnet format -> XAML Styler formatting toolchain with format-at-checkpoints discipline, and the csharp-ls LSP reality (don't chase phantoms; the build is authoritative). Ships copy-able assets (pinned jb + xstyler tool manifest, just style recipes, changed-files script). The .NET-specific companion to the language-agnostic dev-workflow plugin.
